visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, a white top, and a black beaded necklace looks directly at the camera with a surprised and wide-eyed expression. Her lips are painted bright red. The background is a dimly lit indoor setting with visible mirrors and reflections. (2) The scene cuts to a restaurant table where a staff member in a bright red uniform is placing multiple large plates of food on a wooden table. The table is already crowded with various dishes, a green tea bottle, and small glasses. The lighting is warm and interior-focused. (3) A sequence of close-up shots shows a variety of dishes being served, including steamed vegetables, a hot pot, and multiple fried items. The camera pans across the table to emphasize the excessive amount of food being provided. (4) A macro close-up shot focuses on a grilled fish; black chopsticks are used to pick a piece of tender white meat from the fish. The steam and texture of the food are clearly visible against the dark plate. (5) The woman is shown again, eating and looking delighted. The scene then cuts to a young man in a black t-shirt standing in the restaurant, holding a large plate of lettuce and smiling broadly. The background includes wooden structural elements and stacks of water bottles.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV 外國人被台灣餐廳阿姨熱情嚇到. [Slogan]: Surprised by a Taiwanese Restaurant Owner's Passion. [Logo]: 🇰🇷韓國女生. (2) [Subtitle]: （一直招待給我們）. (3) [Variety]: 😂😂😂. [Subtitle]: 外國人幸福到喊叫(?). (4) [Subtitle]: Is here 阿嬤家?. (5) [Subtitle]: 我們點了幾個而已... (6) [Subtitle]: 還送烤魚😂😂🫶. (7) [Subtitle]: 味道又好好吃 天啊. (8) [Subtitle]: 只能趕快掃盤進食😂🔥.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female staff member in red, 1 male friend, and 1 partially visible companion.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Korean woman with long dark hair, wearing a white top and a black beaded necklace with bright red lipstick.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A traditional-style Taiwanese restaurant with wooden tables and walls, large glass windows, and a cluttered tabletop filled with numerous dishes and a prominent green bottle of 御茶園 tea.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo Brazilian Phonk music begins immediately with a heavy, syncopated electronic bassline and sharp snare hits. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone, expressing shock and amusement. The acoustic texture is bright and energetic. (2) As the music maintains its driving rhythm, subtle incidental sounds of ceramic plates clinking and heavy objects being placed on wood are audible. These transients are sharp but secondary to the dominant BGM track. (3) The audio track features rapid cuts that synchronize with the visual scene changes, creating a fragmented and high-density editing style. The speaker's arousal remains high, with frequent rising intonations as the music continues at a steady 132 BPM.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously document the overwhelming generosity and hospitality of a Taiwanese restaurant owner who provides an excessive amount of complimentary dishes to international visitors.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific promotional language or call to action for a brand, although a tea brand is visible in the background.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a popular high-energy audio track to emphasize the 'shock' factor of the food quantity, creating a relatable social media travel trend.
